_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: we observed a significant increase in the total cellular content of glutamate in cells from wild-type versus Nf1+/− mice: 47.3 ± 3.8 nmol/well (n = 117 wells) versus 26.6 ± 3.4 (n = 48 wells), p <0.05, t-test
details: Total cellular glutamate content was lower in Nf1+/- mice: 26.6 ± 3.4 nmol/well versus 47.3 ± 3.8 nmol/well in wild-type (p<0.05)
